case_title: MOLE,CRAIG VS GLEN DAVID ALLAN IND/DBA DAVID ALLAN GLEN & CO.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOLE,CRAIG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GLEN DAVID ALLAN IND/DBA DAVID ALLAN GLEN & CO. $4,934.59 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,954.59 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GLEN DAVID ALLAN IND/DBA DAVID ALLAN GLEN & CO.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,934.59 FILED BY MOLE,CRAIG AS TO DEFENDANT GLEN DAVID ALLAN IND/DBA DAVID ALLAN GLEN & CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GLEN DAVID ALLAN IND/DBA DAVID ALLAN GLEN & CO.
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GLEN DAVID ALLAN IND/DBA DAVID ALLAN GLEN & CO. HEARING SET FOR JUL-18-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT OF JUL-18-1994, GRANTED
CERTIFIED MAILING TO DAVID ALLAN GLEN RECEIVED SIGNED.
EXEMPLIFACATION SUBMITTED FOR SIGNATURE OF LAW AND MOTION JUDGE.
